title: consolidate providers, upgrade models, clean up configs
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Freeing the heavyweights
gist.blurb: We did some massive spring cleaning in the server room and accidentally made a bunch of our heaviest AI models completely free. Enjoy upgraded GPTs, fresh Mistral, and Grok reasoning without spending a single pollen drop.
gist.summary: Consolidated our backend providers to upgrade several core text models and transition previously paid models like GPT-5.4, Grok, and Qwen Coder to the free tier.
gist.impact: Users now have free access to top-tier reasoning and audio models, plus new additions like Mistral-Large-3 and Grok-4-20.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about making heavy/large models free and upgrading them. Visual metaphor: The Nomnom creature eating old 'PAID' invoices while the Bee organizes glowing jars representing the new, free models.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round tan nomnom creature happily eating a stack of paper invoices while the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny apron organizes glowing jars of new models on a wooden shelf. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font on a wooden sign: 'FREE'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
